hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const i=JSON.parse(d);const cmd=i.tool_input?.command||'';if(/git push/.test(cmd)){console.error('[Hook] Review your changes before push...')}}catch{}console.log(d)})"

PreToolUse.description: Remind to review before git push

hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const i=JSON.parse(d);const p=i.tool_input?.file_path||'';if(/\.(md|txt)$/.test(p)&&!/(README|CLAUDE|AGENTS|CONTRIBUTING|CHANGELOG|LICENSE|SKILL)\.md$/i.test(p)&&!/\.claude[\/\\]plans[\/\\]/.test(p)&&!/(^|[\/\\])(docs|skills)[\/\\]/.test(p)){console.error('[Hook] WARNING: Non-standard documentation file: '+p);console.error('[Hook] Consolidate into README.md or docs/ instead')}}catch{}console.log(d)})"

PreToolUse.description: Suggest /compact every 25 tool calls past threshold of 50

hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const i=JSON.parse(d);const cmd=i.tool_input?.command||'';if(/gh pr create/.test(cmd)){const out=i.tool_output?.output||'';const m=out.match(/https:\/\/github.com\/[^/]+\/[^/]+\/pull\/\d+/);if(m){console.error('[Hook] PR created: '+m[0]);const pr=m[0].replace(/.+\/pull\/(\d+)/,'$1');console.error('[Hook] Review: gh pr review '+pr)}}}catch{}console.log(d)})"

PostToolUse.description: Log PR URL and review command after PR creation
Auto-format JS/TS after edits (auto-detects Biome or Prettier; silent if neither installed)
TypeScript check after editing .ts/.tsx files (silent if no tsconfig found)
Warn about console.log with line numbers after edits
Regenerate skills/INDEX.md when any SKILL.md is written

Stop.description: Persist session summary when session ends
Scan all git-modified JS/TS files for console.log after each response

SessionStart.description: Load previous session summary into context on startup

PreCompact.description: Log compaction event and mark active session file
